g.text: Main Flow: Register Patient with Symptoms
Authorization check: Triage_Nurse_Team must have Write permission
Patient record created with or without symptoms
Notify medical staff of immediate action required
Post1: Patient record visible to medical staff
Alternative Flow: Patient Provides No Symptoms
Patient created without symptoms per invariant
Patient placed at end of queue
displaySuccess("Patient registered at end of queue")
displayError("Symptoms entered incorrectly. Please correct before proceeding.")
Clear and actionable error message per usability constraint
Error Flow: System Failure During Registration
return SystemError("Registration failed due to system error")
displayError("System error occurred. Please try again or contact support.")
Manual intervention required per error path
Rollback patient record to maintain consistency
return SystemError("Registration failed due to queue system error")
displayError("System error occurred. Manual intervention required.")
displayError("Access denied. Only authorized triage nurses can register patients.")
displayError("Session expired. Please log in again.")
Pre1: Triage nurse must be logged in
displayError("System is unavailable. Please try again later.")
Pre2: System must be operational and accessible
